Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input A description of a loan application process divided into two parts Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules and Desiderata Recommended Best Practices There is also an Event Log with three cases Case 1 Case 2 Case 3 Task Identify normative violations strict rule breaches with explanations Identify desiderata failures best practice breaches with clarification on severity Suggest interpretations justifications for observed behaviors where possible

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Normative Rules Strict Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Ordering Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Loan Decision before Inform Applicant Approved implies Finalize Documentation before Close Case Rejected implies no Finalize Documentation before Close Case Forbidden Skipping steps reversing order Finalize Documentation after Rejection

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Desiderata Recommended Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision Follow up Call before Close Case encouraged not required

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Sequence App 0900 Credit 0930 Risk 1000 Decision 1100 Approved Inform 1300 Doc 1330 Close 1400 Normative Check Credit before Risk Yes Risk before Decision Yes Decision before Inform Yes Approved implies Doc before Close Yes Any skipped steps No Desiderata Check Credit Check time 30 mins less than 24h OK Inform time 2 hours less than 48h OK Follow up Call Not mentioned not strictly required Verdict Compliant

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Sequence App 0800 Risk 0820 Credit 0900 Decision 0930 Rejected Doc 1000 Close 1030 Normative Check Credit before Risk NO Risk happened at 0820 Credit at 0900 Risk before Decision Yes Decision before Inform NO Inform Applicant is missing entirely Rejected implies Doc before Close NO Documentation was finalized despite rejection Desiderata Check Credit Check time 1 hour less than 24h OK Inform time not applicable Activity missing Follow up Call Not mentioned Verdict Multiple Normative Violations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Sequence App 0900 Credit 1000 next day Risk 1100 Decision 1200 Approved Inform 1500 two days later Doc 0900 next day Close 1000 Normative Check Credit before Risk Yes Risk before Decision Yes Decision before Inform Yes Approved implies Doc before Close Yes Any skipped steps No Desiderata Check Credit Check time about 50 hours greater than 24h Violation Inform time about 51 hours greater than 48h Violation Follow up Call Not present Violation of recommendation Verdict Normatively Compliant Desiderata Violations

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Refining Justifications Case 2 System glitch Human error Rushed process Case 3 Resource constraints Delays in external credit bureaus Staffing issues

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait looking closer at Case 2 The log says Inform Applicant is missing The normative rule says Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome So missing this is a violation Wait looking closer at Case 3 The log explicitly notes the desideratum violations in parentheses I need to confirm those are the only ones Yes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Constraints Did I clearly distinguish between Normative Strict and Desiderata Recommended Yes Did I explain why for each violation Yes Did I address the Inform Applicant missing step in Case 2 Yes that is a critical normative gap Did I address the Finalize Documentation after Rejection in Case 2 Yes
